untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires detection of curved trend line with dual/multiple bumps (38% occurrence rate) and peak comparison logic (8% secondary bump above first bump). These geometric pattern recognition features cannot be expressed using only standard technical indicators without custom curve-fitting algorithms. Converted entry conditions represent lower highs/lows and price near range extremes as proxies, but true arc curve detection is untranslatable. Exit conditions and stop/target placement are author-silent per specification.
